title: Package Information and Search
description: Querying, showing, and searching package metadata, suggestions, and funding info

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Runs CLI commands to discover and inspect packages

actors.name: RepositoryManager
actors.description: Provides access to local, remote, and platform repositories

actors.name: Locker
actors.description: Provides locked repository data from composer.lock

use_cases.name: Show Package Information
key_options: --strict: non-zero exit if outdated packages exist

use_cases.name: Search Packages
flow: Build CompositeRepository from localRepo + platformRepo + remote repos
Dispatch PluginEvents::COMMAND event
Determine search mode: SEARCH_FULLTEXT | SEARCH_NAME | SEARCH_VENDOR
repos->search(query, mode, type, io)
Output results as text (with abandoned warnings) or JSON

use_cases.name: Show Package Suggestions
key_options: --by-suggestion: group output by suggested package name
--list: show only list of suggested package names
flow: Build InstalledRepository from RootPackageRepository + PlatformRepository + locked/local repo
Create SuggestedPackagesReporter
Iterate packages, call reporter->addSuggestionsFromPackage(package)
Determine output mode (MODE_BY_PACKAGE, MODE_BY_SUGGESTION, MODE_LIST)
reporter->output(mode, installedRepo, rootPackage)

use_cases.name: View Dependency Licenses
flow: Dispatch PluginEvents::COMMAND event
If --locked: locker->getLockedRepository(!no-dev)
Else: repo = localRepository; optionally filter with RepositoryUtils::filterRequiredPackages()
PackageSorter::sortPackagesAlphabetically(packages)
Output: text (Table with Name/Version/Licenses), json (map), or summary (license counts sorted by frequency)

use_cases.name: Discover Funding Information
flow: Get local repo and build CompositeRepository of remote repos
Load all installed packages as MatchAllConstraint map
remoteRepos->loadPackages() to get dev/default-branch versions
Collect funding from default branches via package->getFunding()
Fallback: collect funding from installed packages for any remaining
insertFundingData(): groups funding URLs by vendor, normalizes GitHub sponsor URLs
Output: text (vendor-grouped links) or json

key_relationships: All commands depend_on Composer instance via requireComposer()/tryComposer()
All commands depend_on RepositoryManager for local/remote repos
shared_patterns: All commands support --format (text/json) for machine-readable output
All commands use IOInterface for output
All commands optionally support --no-dev to exclude dev dependencies
Plugin event dispatching before execution (CommandEvent/PluginEvents::COMMAND) in Search, Licenses, Fund
Repository abstraction: InstalledRepository, CompositeRepository, PlatformRepository, Locker
